lemon_market_new_listings.description: The vehicle is in good condition. The exterior shows minor cosmetic wear consistent with age. The interior is clean and well-maintained. Mechanical systems are reliable and in good working order.

The vehicle is in good condition. The exterior has minor surface scratches but no dents. The interior is clean with light wear on the seats. Mechanically, the engine and transmission are in good working order.
Fair condition.

Get ready for a rewarding project! This vehicle is a true 'diamond in the rough' and will need some significant mechanical and cosmetic attention to get back to its prime. It’s an ideal choice for a talented mechanic or anyone looking for a budget-friendly parts car. Grab this opportunity to breathe new life into a vehicle with potential at a fantastic price!

This vehicle is in good overall condition and has been consistently well-maintained throughout its life. The exterior paint retains a nice luster and looks great from a short distance, though a closer inspection reveals some minor stone chips on the front bumper and a few light surface scratches typical of a well-cared-for daily driver. The interior is clean and smoke-free, showing only minor wear on the driver's seat and floor mats. Mechanically, the car is sound, shifts smoothly, and has a documented service history. It is a reliable and presentable vehicle that offers a great balance of quality and value.

This vehicle is in good condition and has been well-maintained throughout its ownership. The exterior paint still holds a great shine, though there are some minor stone chips on the hood and a few light surface scratches consistent with regular use. Inside, the cabin is clean and smoke-free, showing only minor wear on the driver’s side seat bolster. Mechanically, the car is solid and drives smoothly, with all major systems functioning as they should. It has a complete service history, though it will likely need a new set of tires within the next 5,000 miles. It is a reliable, honest car ready for its next owner.

Presenting an automotive specimen of unparalleled distinction. This vehicle remains in impeccable, showroom-grade condition, reflecting a standard of preservation that transcends the ordinary. Every surface and mechanical component has been meticulously maintained to meet the most exacting requirements of the discerning driver. This is an investment-grade opportunity for those who demand uncompromising excellence and a pristine aesthetic.

Hi everyone! 🚗 I'm honestly so sad to let this beauty go, but it’s time for someone else to enjoy it! This car is absolutely pristine—seriously, it looks and smells like it just rolled off the showroom floor. No scratches, no dings, and it runs like an absolute dream. It’s been pampered its whole life and is ready for its next adventure. You won't find one in better shape! Feel free to reach out with any questions!

This collector-grade E46 M3 represents the pinnacle of naturally aspirated engineering, featuring the legendary S54 inline-six engine with individual throttle bodies and a crisp 8,000 RPM redline. Mechanically flawless, the vehicle has undergone comprehensive preventative maintenance, including a professional subframe reinforcement and a complete Vanos system overhaul with upgraded seals. The valvetrain has been precision-shimmed to factory specifications, ensuring peak volumetric efficiency. Power is channeled through a tactile 6-speed Getrag manual transmission to a responsive variable M differential. With its original suspension geometry intact and bushings refreshed, this specimen offers the razor-sharp turn-in and longitudinal stability synonymous with BMW’s M-division heritage. An investment-grade example for the discerning purist.
Used car. Mint condition. No cosmetic flaws. Interior like new. Mechanically perfect. Low mileage.

This vehicle is an absolute time capsule, meticulously preserved to maintain its showroom-floor integrity. The exterior boasts a mirror-like finish, free from even the slightest swirl marks, stone chips, or door dings, and has been protected by a multi-stage ceramic coating. Inside, the cabin remains in flawless condition; the premium leather upholstery is supple with no bolster wear, the carpets are pristine, and the original factory scent lingers. Every electronic feature, including the high-fidelity sound system and climate control, operates with precision. Under the hood, the engine bay is spotless, reflecting a rigorous maintenance schedule performed exclusively by certified technicians. This car has been strictly garage-kept under a breathable cover and has never seen rain or snow. For the buyer who accepts nothing less than perfection, this is a rare opportunity to own a truly immaculate example of automotive excellence.

Presented here is a vehicle of uncompromising caliber, maintained to a standard that defies its pre-owned status. This specimen exhibits a pristine aesthetic and mechanical profile, reflective of a life spent in climate-controlled environments and under a rigorous maintenance regimen. Every surface, from the flawless exterior finish to the untouched interior upholstery, remains in showroom condition. For the discerning collector or enthusiast who demands nothing less than perfection, this offering represents a definitive benchmark in automotive preservation.

Presenting an automotive specimen of unrivaled caliber. This vehicle remains in impeccable, showroom condition, having been meticulously maintained to the highest standards of preservation. Every detail, from the pristine exterior finish to the flawless interior appointments, reflects a legacy of careful stewardship. For the discerning buyer who demands nothing less than perfection, this offering represents a rare opportunity to acquire a vehicle of true distinction.

Hey there! I’m selling my absolute pride and joy, and let me tell you, she is a total dream! This car is in truly mint condition—honestly, it looks and drives like it just rolled off the showroom floor. I’ve meticulously babied it since day one, so it’s completely spotless inside and out. If you’re looking for a ride that feels practically brand new and is ready for a new home, you’ve found it! Come say hi and take it for a spin!

Presenting a collector-grade 2004 BMW M3 (E46) in pristine Carbon Black over Cinnamon Nappa leather. This example features the legendary S54 3.2L naturally aspirated inline-six, delivering 333 hp through six individual throttle bodies and a crisp Getrag 6-speed manual transmission. Mechanically flawless,
Mint condition. Flawless interior and exterior. Zero mechanical issues. Garage kept. Service records included.

This vehicle is a true masterclass in preservation, maintained in absolute showroom condition since it first left the dealership. The exterior boasts a deep, mirror-like finish with zero scratches, dents, or stone chips, having been strictly garage-kept and protected by a high-grade ceramic coating. Inside, the cabin remains pristine and smoke-free; the premium leather upholstery shows no signs of creasing, the original floor mats are spotless, and every technological feature functions flawlessly. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach, supported by a comprehensive, documented service history and exceptionally low mileage. It delivers the tight, responsive, and quiet ride quality of a brand-new vehicle. This is a rare opportunity for a discerning buyer to acquire a perfectly preserved example that requires no additional investment.

We are pleased to offer this singular automotive specimen, presented in impeccable, showroom-ready condition. For the discerning client who demands an uncompromising standard of excellence, this offering stands as a definitive benchmark of its class.

The exterior paint retains a deep, mirror-like luster with zero imperfections, scratches, or stone chips, having been kept strictly in a climate-controlled garage and protected by a premium ceramic coating. Inside, the cabin remains pristine; the leather upholstery is supple without a single crease, the original floor mats are spotless, and it still retains that signature new-car scent. Mechanically, it is flawless. Every service has been performed ahead of schedule at authorized dealerships, with a complete paper trail included. The engine runs whisper-quiet, the transmission shifts with precision, and the undercarriage is as clean as the body. This is a rare opportunity to own a collector-grade example that drives exactly as it did the day it left the factory floor. No accidents, no modifications, and absolutely no compromises.

This vehicle remains in showroom condition, featuring unblemished paintwork and an interior that retains its factory-fresh integrity. This is, without compromise, the finest example currently available on the market.
